message:
test(validate): add E2E tests for validate command

Adds 14 E2E tests covering:
- Evidence gate auto-ACCEPT/REJECT decisions
- LLM validation fallback for ambiguous cases
- REFINE verdict normalization to ACCEPT_WITH_CAUTION
- JSON output format validation
- Human-readable output formatting
- Error handling for empty/whitespace rules
- Outcome classification for success/failure snippets

Uses mock CassRunner and LLMIO to test without external dependencies.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
